name: Soy Ginger Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the soy sauce and water.
2. Stir in the dry sherry, grated ginger root, chopped scallions, minced garlic, sesame oil, rice vinegar, and sugar.
3. Mix all ingredients together thoroughly.
4. Allow the mixture to stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before using.
